title: Diagnostic Checks for Time Series Residuals
description: A flowchart outlining the sequential process of applying diagnostic checks to the residuals of a fitted time series model to validate its adequacy.
elements: Check for Autocorrelation (ACF/PACF Plots, Ljung-Box Test)
Check for Homoscedasticity (Plot Residuals vs. Time, ARCH Test)
relationships: Process starts with the residuals from the fitted model, which are then passed through a series of checks. If all checks are passed, the model is deemed adequate. If any check fails, the model is deemed inadequate and must be revised before the process repeats.
